tooltip.chestseparators.desc.copy_layout: Copies the current layout to clipboard
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.paste_layou: Pastes the copied layout from clipboard
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.edit_filter: Create or edit a filter for the selected slots
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.delete_all_: Deletes every filter in this chest
message.chestseparators.select_first: Select at least one slot first.
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.area_select: Select slots by dragging a rectangular area
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.trace_selec: Select slots by painting over them
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.copy_filter: Copy all filters from this chest to clipboard
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.paste_filte: Paste filters from clipboard to this chest
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.conflict.ov: Deletes existing filters in the selection and creates a new one
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.conflict.de: Keeps existing filters intact and only applies to empty slots
gui.chestseparators.conflict_desc: Some selected slots already have a filter.
gui.chestseparators.unsaved_changes_desc: You have unsaved changes in this filter.
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.eyedropper: Pick a color directly from the screen
tooltip.chestseparators.desc.exit: Save changes and close the color picker
gui.chestseparators.color_picker.instruc: Middle-click a color to copy. Left-click a custom slot to paste.
config.chestseparators.show_left_panel.t: Shows the whitelist preview panel in standard chest UI. Hold modifier key to override.
config.chestseparators.enable_preview_an: Automatically scrolls the item list in the preview panel.
config.chestseparators.show_edit_buttons: Displays the tool buttons inside the chest GUI.
config.chestseparators.bg_transparency.t: Opacity level for the slot background colors (0 = Invisible, 100 = Solid).
config.chestseparators.line_transparency: Opacity level for the separator lines (0 = Invisible, 100 = Solid).
config.chestseparators.default_rule_manu: Newly created groups will allow manual clicks by default.
config.chestseparators.default_rule_shif: Newly created groups will allow shift-clicks by default.
config.chestseparators.default_rule_hopp: Newly created groups will allow hopper insertion by default.
config.chestseparators.expel_invalid_ite: When applying a new filter, existing invalid items will be pushed to the player's inventory or dropped.
config.chestseparators.toggle_edit_butto: Quickly show/hide the Edit Lines and Whitelist buttons.
config.chestseparators.toggle_preview_pa: Quickly show/hide the left preview panel.
config.chestseparators.show_panel_modifi: Hold this key to force the left panel to show if disabled.
message.chestseparators.locked: Someone is already editing this chest!
gui.chestseparators.expel_items_desc: Some items currently in these slots do not match the new rules. They will be ejected from the chest.
config.chestseparators.dark_mode.tooltip: Toggle between dark and light UI themes.
config.chestseparators.show_deposit_butt: Shows or hides the quick deposit button in the chest interface.
config.chestseparators.deposit_filter.to: Key to deposit items only into slots with matching filters.
config.chestseparators.deposit_all.toolt: Key to deposit items into filters and any remaining empty slots.
tooltip.chestseparators.deposit_items:
Deposit to Filters
§8Hold [Shift] for more options
message.chestseparators.deposit_failed: No valid slots found to deposit items.
config.chestseparators.close_on_click_ou: Closes the menu when clicking outside the interface.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.chestsepa: Achieve fast inventory clearing with custom auto-deposit. The game finally knows exactly what you really want and where you want it.
